infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Reflect AI to turn your spoken reflections into text.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Reflect AI to use the microphone for voice reflections.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Reflect AI to attach a photo to a private journal entry.

plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Reflect AI to turn spoken reflections into text.
